---
title: "Things I've made"
editor: visual
---

After a day of staring at a screen, I like to change it up with a hands-on activity.

## Baking

This past year I've been experimenting with yeast! I baked my first loaf of bread and tested out cinnamon rolls and cardamom buns. I'm building up courage to tackle sourdough next year.

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![One of my recent loaves](media/bread.jpg){fig-align="left" width="300"}

![Cinnamon rolls with extra cinnamon](media/cinnamon.jpg){fig-align="center" width="300"}

![Cinnamon rolls with extra cinnamon](media/cardamom.jpg){fig-align="center" width="300"}
:::

## Sewing

## Crochet

Cat hats are a quick project that require little time and produce a lot of joy (not their joy, as you can see).

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![](media/pumpkin-hat.jpg){alt="One of my recent loaves" fig-align="left" width="300"}

![](media/beanie.jpg){alt="Cinnamon rolls with extra cinnamon" fig-align="center" width="300"}

![](media/party-hat.jpg){alt="Cinnamon rolls with extra cinnamon" fig-align="right" width="300"}
:::
